text:
Once upon a time in a kingdom not very far from the mouse hole, there lived a little girl whose curiosity knew no bounds. Her curiosity had taken her deep into enchanted forest where the moon shone so brightly that stars shook like berries falling into a basket.

Her name was Little Red Riding Hood. Each time she heard the moon's merry tune she'd hop deeper into the enchanted forest. Once she'd ventured far into the enchanted forest where the biggest rabbit anybody had ever seen lived.

So there Little Red Riding Hood did go a little too far...

One day she got so curious that she ventured past a broooming rabbit who just happened to be the biggest hopping thing ever seen. She could hardly keep her eyes off him.

He seemed totally enchanted.

After a long silent stare:

"Oh! Oh dear!"

She blushed furiously.

Maybe that was just the forest's moon gleaming on his collar.

She quickly spun on her little bare feet and took off down the enchanted path.

She knew
